title: Starbucks Coupons
description: What are the latest online discount coupons, promotions, or contests that offer a $50 Starbucks gift card?
narrative: The user is looking for current offers that enable them to obtain a $50 Starbucks gift card, including coupon codes, cash‑back deals, sign‑up alerts, or promotional contests. Relevant documents should mention Starbucks gift card discounts, coupon listings, promotional giveaways, or any cash‑back programs related to Starbucks purchases. Content that simply mentions generic coupons without referencing Starbucks or the $50 value is not relevant.

title: Lambs Apartment Rental
description: What are the available rental apartments in Lambs, Saint‑Lô, that are priced under €450 per month and include a parking space?
narrative: The user is looking for current rental listings located in the Lambs area of Saint‑Lô. Relevant documents must mention apartments (or studios/lofts) for rent in Lambs, have a monthly rent of €450 or less, and provide a parking facility. Listings that meet these location, price, and parking criteria, and include details such as size, number of rooms, and furnishing status are considered relevant.

title: Lotus EVE Hybrid
description: What are the specifications, development status, and market viability of the Lotus EVE Hybrid concept presented at the Geneva motor show?
narrative: The user is looking for detailed information on the Lotus EVE Hybrid, including its powertrain layout (1.6 L engine plus 30 kW electric motor), hybrid technology (CVT, regenerative braking, stop‑and‑go engine cut‑off), claimed CO₂ reduction, cost considerations, and whether the model is a production‑ready vehicle or merely a media concept. Relevant documents should discuss the vehicle’s technical features, the relationship to Lotus’s parent company, and any statements about commercial availability or pricing.

title: Veal Cream Stew
description: What is a detailed recipe for a veal blanquette that uses cream, mushrooms, and vegetables?
narrative: The user is looking for a complete, step‑by‑step French blanquette de veau recipe that includes veal meat, carrots, leeks, onions, ceps (or other mushrooms), thick cream, parsley, and appropriate cooking times, temperatures, and serving instructions. Relevant passages should list the exact ingredients, quantities, preparation methods, simmering times, reduction steps, and any garnish or accompaniment suggestions.

title: Softail Chrome Curve Guard
description: Where can I buy a chrome‑finished PARE‑COURROIE curve guard that fits 1986‑1999 Harley‑Davidson Softail models, and what are the price, shipping, and installation details?
narrative: The user seeks commercial information about the PARE‑COURROIE curve guard for Softail motorcycles, specifically a short‑chrome (polished stainless steel) version compatible with Softail models from 1986 to 1999. Relevant documents should describe the product’s compatibility, finish options, price (including tax, shipping and installation), and how to purchase or contact the seller. Any source that provides these specifications, pricing breakdowns, and contact details for A.F.B. Motorcycles or similar vendors satisfies the need.

title: Pirate Crew Size
description: What was the typical number of men crewed on a pirate ship, and how did it vary by vessel type?
narrative: The user is looking for historical information on the typical crew complement of pirate vessels, including the range of crew sizes for different ship classes such as frigates, barques, sloops, and schooners. Relevant documents should provide numeric estimates (e.g., 30‑75 for smaller, fast ships and up to 200 for large frigates) and discuss factors that influenced crew size, such as the intended mission (port raids vs. merchant hunting).

title: Intermediate Car Rental
description: I need information on intermediate (mid‑size) car rental options, features, and price comparisons for Desa, Indonesia.
narrative: The user is planning a trip that requires a vehicle larger than a compact but smaller than a full‑size, and wants details on the available mid‑size models (e.g., Toyota Avanza, Corolla, Nissan Sentra), seating and luggage capacity, fuel economy, transmission choices, and a comparison of rates from major providers such as Alamo, Europcar, Sixt, Budget, Hertz, etc. Relevant documents should mention intermediate car rentals in Desa, Indonesia, include vehicle specifications, rental company names, and pricing or booking information.

title: Cárdenas Figerola Biography
description: Where can I find a detailed biography of Gustavo Adolfo Cárdenas Figerola, covering his civil status, military career, awards, operations, and publications?
narrative: The user is looking for a comprehensive biographical record of the officer Gustavo Adolfo Cárdenas Figerola. Relevant results must provide the full set of information typically included in the École supérieure de guerre officer notices: personal data, career timeline, ranks and assignments, decorations and citations, operations in which he served, any authored works, and the source references used to compile the biography. Materials that merely list his name or a brief summary without these details are not sufficient.

title: Pôle Emploi Union
description: What are the history, purpose, and current activities of the National Staff Union of Pôle Emploi?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the National Staff Union of Pôle Emploi, including when it was founded (over 50 years ago), its mission to study and defend the material and moral rights of its members, its organizational independence, and any recent statements or articles about its role. Relevant documents should describe the union's origins, legal status, core objectives, and recent activities or publications.

title: Land Selection Criteria
description: What essential factors should I consider when choosing a plot of land for building a detached house in France, according to LMP Constructeur guidelines?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive guidance on selecting a buildable site for a new detached home in France. Relevant documents must describe the legal checks (POS, PLU), geographic considerations (noise, pollution, services, internet), plot characteristics (size, shape, demarcations, soil type), orientation for energy efficiency, and compliance with RT 2012 thermal regulations. Materials that only mention general construction or marketing without covering these specific criteria are not relevant.

title: Car2go Sustainability
description: How does Mercedes' Car2go self‑service car system compare to electric car‑sharing schemes in terms of environmental impact and operational constraints?
narrative: The user is seeking a nuanced comparison between Mercedes' Car2go program (using diesel Smart Fortwo vehicles) and electric car‑sharing initiatives such as municipal projects like Autolib’. Relevant information must describe Car2go’s operating model (registration, mobile booking, pricing, vehicle availability), its emissions profile (lowest CO2‑emitting diesel vehicle), and why electric car‑sharing would be more restrictive (need for recharge terminals). Documents that discuss Car2go’s testing in Ulm, cost structure, diesel vs electric considerations, and references to other city‑based sharing schemes are considered relevant.

title: Early Resistant Potatoes
description: Which potato varieties are harvested early (under 100 days), have strong resistance to downy mildew, and provide good yields suitable for a home vegetable garden?
narrative: The user is planning a small garden and wants to select potato cultivars that can be harvested early in the season, are notably resistant to downy mildew, and still produce a respectable harvest. Relevant documents must mention the variety’s days to maturity (early or semi‑early), its resistance level to downy mildew (or other disease ratings), and yield performance. Culinary use (e.g., good for steaming or salads) is a secondary but acceptable detail. Any variety lacking clear information on one of these three criteria should be considered non‑relevant.

title: Genesis Creation Days
description: What are the specific events and verses associated with each of the six days of creation in Genesis chapter 1?
narrative: The user wants a clear, day‑by‑day breakdown of the creation narrative, listing the act performed on each day (Day 1 through Day 6) and providing the exact Genesis 1 verses that describe those acts. Relevant results must contain the verse text that outlines each day's creation and preserve the canonical order; supplemental information about Bible apps or translations is only acceptable if it includes the required verse excerpts.

title: Newts Theatre Review
description: What are the critical assessments and thematic interpretations of Knaïve Theatre’s 2017 Fringe adaptation of Karel Čapek’s *War with the Newts*?
narrative: The user seeks in‑depth commentary on the immersive stage production, including professional and audience reviews, analysis of its storytelling, set and sound design, and how it explores themes such as capitalism, exploitation, and nationalism. Relevant documents should discuss the production’s execution, performance style, audience experience, and any critique of its strengths or shortcomings. Sources that merely list ticket prices or unrelated charity information are not relevant.

title: BLAMPIN Holding Overview
description: What are the registration details, legal form, capital history, and current directors of BLAMPIN FRUITS HOLDING?
narrative: The user wants a full corporate profile of BLAMPIN FRUITS HOLDING, covering its registration number, incorporation date, legal structure, VAT status, changes in share capital, and the names and positions of its board members and executives. Relevant items are official registry entries, capital modification announcements, director and officer appointment records, and filing dates for annual and consolidated accounts.

title: Prevail Conjugation
description: What are the complete French conjugation forms of the verb "prévaloir" (to prevail) across all tenses, moods, and pronouns?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list of conjugated forms for the French verb "prévaloir," including indicative (present, past, future, perfect, pluperfect, etc.), conditional, subjunctive, infinitive, and imperative, together with the appropriate personal, demonstrative, and possessive pronouns. Relevant results should provide each full paradigm, clearly marked by tense/mood and subject pronoun.

title: Vietnam Child Sponsorship
description: What personal travel narratives detail volunteering or sponsoring children through charities while visiting rural regions of Vietnam?
narrative: The user seeks firsthand accounts that describe a traveler’s experience working with or supporting child‑focused NGOs in Vietnam, especially in off‑the‑beaten‑track areas such as Sapa, Bao Loc, the Mekong Delta, and other rural locales. Relevant documents should mention interactions with local families, observations of poverty, descriptions of sponsorship programs (e.g., monthly financial support, school aid), and reflections on the cultural and emotional impact of the trip.

title: Organic Seed Potatoes
description: What organic seed potatoes are available that match the specified cultivar traits, disease resistance profile, and yield expectations?
narrative: The user is seeking commercial listings or product information for organic seed potatoes that meet detailed agronomic specifications (e.g., tall upright growth, specific foliage and tuber characteristics, moderate to low susceptibility to various diseases and pests, desired yield and dry matter content) and price information. Relevant documents should describe seed potato varieties, their biometric and resistance attributes, organic certification, and purchasing details.

title: Charenton Street Paris
description: What are the historical origins, name changes, and notable architectural landmarks of Rue de Charenton in Paris's 12th arrondissement?
narrative: The user wants a thorough history of Rue de Charenton, covering its Roman roots, successive names (e.g., Rue de la Planchette, Rue de la Vallée‑de‑Fécamp, Rue de Marengo), the unusual street‑numbering system, and key heritage sites such as listed façades, the Théophile‑Gautier high school, the former Krieger factory, and other monuments. Relevant passages should detail the street’s layout, evolution, and designated historic buildings.

title: Bordeaux Gas Suppliers
description: What alternatives exist to Gaz de Bordeaux for residential natural‑gas supply in the city, and are any non‑regulated providers currently available?
narrative: The user wants to know whether any gas supplier besides the regulated Gaz de Bordeaux can serve households in Bordeaux, including any recent entrants such as ENI or future competition plans. Relevant documents must mention the monopoly status of Gaz de Bordeaux, the absence or presence of alternative suppliers, any claims about ENI or other companies offering gas in Bordeaux, and any regulatory or infrastructure constraints affecting competition.

title: Kia Sportage Rental
description: What are the daily and weekly rates, seasonal price differences, and insurance coverage for renting a Kia Sportage in St. Martin?
narrative: The user is looking for comprehensive information about renting a Kia Sportage on the island of St. Martin. Relevant documents should provide the price per day and per week for both low and high seasons, the exact dates that define each season, details on included insurance (all‑risk, deductible, tax), mileage limits, and any additional services such as airport pickup, free second driver, or child seat. Documents that lack specific pricing, seasonal period definitions, or insurance terms are not considered relevant.

title: Gallic Rooster Symbolism
description: What is the historical significance and evolution of the Gallic rooster as a symbol of France?
narrative: The user seeks a concise overview of the Gallic rooster's origins, its adoption as a patriotic emblem, and its appearances on currency, monuments, uniforms, sports insignia, and official seals across different French regimes. Relevant passages must describe the breed, its symbolic meanings, and specific historical uses (e.g., 1950s coins, mayoral badge, Élysée Palace gate).

title: US Car Rental Age
description: What are the minimum age requirements and any additional fees for renting a car in the United States?
narrative: The user wants detailed information on the age thresholds for renting a vehicle in the U.S., including the standard minimum age, extra surcharges for drivers aged 21‑24, and any related conditions such as required license tenure and credit‑card guarantees. Relevant documents must mention that renters must be at least 21 years old, that drivers between 21 and 24 incur an additional fee (approximately $30 per day), and that a valid driver’s license held for more than 12 months and a credit card in the renter’s name are mandatory.

title: Nantes One-way Rental
description: What are the costs, fees, and requirements for a one‑way car rental from Nantes Airport to another location in France?
narrative: The user wants comprehensive information about renting a car at Nantes Airport and returning it at a different location. Relevant documents must provide the price structure (daily rate and any additional one‑way surcharge), the types of vehicles commonly available for such rentals, the documentation needed (driver's license, credit card, international permit), and any policy details (cancellation rules, insurance options, age restrictions). Only sources that mention these specific one‑way rental conditions for Nantes Airport are considered relevant.

title: Seed Potato Supplier
description: What are the contact details of French companies that sell seed potatoes?
narrative: The user seeks information on companies in France that market seed potatoes, specifically needing the business name, physical address, telephone, fax, and email address. Any document that provides a French seed potato producer or distributor together with complete contact information satisfies the information need.

title: Plastic People
description: When did the band Plastic People (formerly The Naked Man) perform in Villefranche-sur‑Saône and what were the details of that concert?
narrative: The user is seeking concrete information about the Plastic People performance mentioned in the municipal video magazine, including the date, venue, lineup (e.g., Sébastien Ficagna, Valéria Pacella), any genre description, and any related media coverage. Relevant documents must explicitly reference the concert, the artists involved, the location (Villefranche‑sur‑Saône), and provide contextual details such as the style of music or audience reaction.

title: Kids Havaianas Gold
description: Where can I buy gold‑colored Havaianas sandals for children, and what sizes and store options are available?
narrative: The user is looking for information about children's Havaianas sandals in gold (or gold‑tone) color. title: Renault Espace Turbo Specs
description: What are the detailed technical specifications and performance characteristics of the Renault Espace 2.0 16V Turbo (model years 2002‑2006)?
narrative: The user seeks a comprehensive list of technical data for the Renault Espace 2.0 16V Turbo, including engine output, dimensions, weight, fuel consumption, emissions, transmission, and performance metrics such as acceleration and top speed. Relevant documents are those that provide exact specification figures, model‑year information, and official technical descriptions; promotional or unrelated sales offers are not sufficient.

title: Guadeloupe Airport Car Rental
description: What are the low‑price, fully insured car rental options with unlimited mileage available at Pointe‑à‑Pitre airport in Guadeloupe?
narrative: The user wants detailed information about renting a car directly at Guadeloupe's main international airport. title: Renault Express Marketplace
description: What are the current listings, prices, and condition details for used Renault Express vans in Morocco and other French‑speaking African markets?
narrative: The user intends to purchase a used Renault Express for commercial purposes and needs a consolidated view of available advertisements across online classified platforms in Morocco, Algeria, Tunisia, Senegal, and Reunion. Relevant results should include the vehicle’s year, mileage, price (or price range), seller type (private or dealer), and any notable equipment or modifications. title: Deer Lake Rental
description: What car rental companies, vehicle classes, and price options are available at Deer Lake Airport for a driver between 25 and 70 years old?
narrative: The user wants a comprehensive overview of car rental services at Deer Lake Airport, including which companies operate there, the types of vehicles (e.g., economy, compact, minibus, luxury, convertible), any age restrictions, and typical pricing or rate information. Relevant documents should mention providers such as Hertz, Europcar, Sixt, and others, describe vehicle categories and capacities, note the driver‑age requirement, and provide details on reservation options and cost considerations.

title: Avoid Post-Accident Errors
description: What actions should I avoid immediately after being involved in a car accident?
narrative: The user is looking for a concise, practical list of things that must not be done right after a collision in order to protect legal rights, safety, and insurance claims. Relevant material should describe prohibited behaviors such as leaving the scene, admitting fault, speaking to the other driver or insurance agents prematurely, and contacting the insurer before consulting an attorney, and should explain why each action is risky.

title: Gold Medal Winners
description: Which wineries received Gold medals in the 2019 Bordeaux Competition and what volumes of wine did they present?
narrative: The user wants a complete list of all entries that earned a Gold (OR) medal in the 2019 Bordeaux Competition for Wine of Aquitaine. For each gold‑medal winery, the response should include the estate name, contact details (phone, email, website if available), and the volume of wine presented. Only entries marked as Gold/OR in the 2019 medal list are considered relevant.

title: French Death Notices
description: Where can I find recent death notices for towns in the Indre-et-Loire department and set up alerts for new entries?
narrative: The user is looking for an online source that publishes death notices for municipalities in Indre-et-Loire (e.g., Beaumont, Vouvray, Chemillé-sur-Dême) and wants to know how to subscribe to email alerts for future notices. Relevant results should describe the service that aggregates these notices, list the covered towns, and explain how to create or manage death alerts.

title: Renewable Policy Effectiveness
description: How do feed‑in tariffs, renewable portfolio standards, and carbon taxes compare in achieving cost‑efficient decarbonization of electricity generation with intermittent wind and solar?
narrative: The user seeks scholarly analysis of public‑policy instruments for transitioning electricity generation from fossil fuels to intermittent renewables. Relevant documents must discuss the economic efficiency of each instrument (e.g., investment incentives, power‑price volatility, need for backup generation), compare outcomes such as optimal energy mix and total electricity production, and mention any required complementary measures (e.g., consumption taxes, storage, smart meters). Studies that model these policies, highlight a pigouvian carbon tax as the first‑best solution versus FIT/RPS, and assess their impact on market behavior are considered relevant.

title: Council Personnel Changes
description: What personnel and establishment plan modifications were approved by the Community Council of the Île de Ré on 28 November 2019?
narrative: The user seeks official records that describe the staff‑related decisions made in Deliberation No. 126 on 28 Nov 2019, including creation, abolition, and re‑grading of posts, the legal articles cited, the effective dates of the changes, and any voting outcomes. Relevant documents are those that contain the council's minutes, the list of positions affected, the grades assigned, and the procedural context of the personnel modifications.

title: Host Plant List
description: What plants serve as larval hosts for the silver‑spotted skipper (Epargyreus clarus) and how does host usage differ across its geographic range?
narrative: The user is researching the larval host plant repertoire of Epargyreus clarus and wants a comprehensive list of plants on which females lay eggs, with attention to regional variations (e.g., Florida vs. northern states). Relevant documents must mention specific host species by scientific name, indicate their role as larval food plants, and, when available, note geographic or habitat context. Sources that only discuss adult nectar sources, adult behavior, or unrelated butterfly species are not relevant.

title: Light Leek Quiche
description: How can I create a lower‑fat, reduced‑calorie version of the leek quiche that uses the broken‑dough recipe?
narrative: The user wants a healthier adaptation of the leek quiche described in the document, focusing on reducing fat and overall calories while preserving the dish’s flavor and texture. Relevant information includes the original ingredient list (leeks, onions, lardons, mushrooms, cream, milk, eggs, optional Gruyère) and preparation steps. Answers that suggest ingredient substitutions (e.g., omitting or reducing lardons, using low‑fat dairy, alternative cheeses), portion adjustments, cooking technique changes, or other ways to lighten the recipe are considered relevant.

title: Car Valuation
description: How can I accurately determine the market value of my used car before selling it?
narrative: The user wants practical guidance for estimating a used car's selling price, including which factors (make, model, year, mileage, condition, etc.) affect value, reliable online valuation tools, and tips for avoiding under‑ or over‑pricing. Relevant documents should explain step‑by‑step how to input vehicle details into a free estimator, describe typical valuation criteria used by buy‑back services, and outline how to interpret the resulting price for setting a realistic asking amount.

title: Disability Employment Convention
description: What are the main objectives, concrete measures, and anticipated results of the 2021‑2024 convention signed between the French State and the Agefiph to boost employment of people with disabilities?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive information about the State‑Agefiph agreement covering its four priority orientations (enterprise support, skill development, career compensation, and partnership building), the quantitative targets (e.g., raising employment rate to 6%), the specific tools offered to companies and job‑seekers (hiring bonuses, apprenticeship incentives, SME advisory), and the governance/monitoring mechanisms. Relevant material includes official government press releases, detailed policy briefs, progress reports, and expert commentary that explain how the convention is intended to operate and any early outcomes or assessments of its impact.

title: Space Mission Films
description: Which science‑fiction movies about space missions are currently available for streaming on Canal+?
narrative: The user is looking for a curated list of sci‑fi feature films that center on space‑travel or mission narratives (e.g., lunar landings, interplanetary voyages, astronaut crews) and that can be watched on the Canal+ streaming service. Relevant items must be movies (not series or documentaries), belong to the science‑fiction genre, have a clear space‑mission plot, be released in the 21st century, and be available in the Canal+ catalog in HD (either original language or dubbed).

title: Oil-Blue Lamps
description: Where can I purchase oil‑blue lamps from the Opal collection, and what are their design features and price options?
narrative: The user seeks commercial listings for oil‑blue lamps, specifically those identified as part of the Opal collection. Relevant documents must mention oil‑blue lamps, include design details (e.g., round base, tapered foot, metal lacquered finish, brass accents), dimensions or model identifiers, and provide purchasing information such as retailer names, promotional codes, delivery options, or price indications.

title: Crete Family All-Inclusive
description: What all‑inclusive hotels in Crete offer family‑friendly amenities, such as swimming pools, children's clubs, and inclusive meals, and what tourist taxes or extra fees apply?
narrative: The user is planning a family vacation to Crete and seeks 4‑star all‑inclusive resorts that provide facilities like outdoor and indoor pools, children's activities, and meals and drinks included in the price. Relevant information must detail the hotel's amenities, the structure of the all‑inclusive package, any mandatory tourist taxes (e.g., per‑night room taxes) and additional optional charges (e.g., beach umbrella fees, paid activities, seasonal closures). Documents that do not mention these aspects are not relevant.

title: Monalisa Harvest Timing
description: What are the recommended harvest periods for Monalisa potatoes for fresh consumption versus long‑term storage?
narrative: The user wants clear guidance on when to harvest Monalisa potatoes: approximately 90 days after planting for a fresh crop and about 120 days for a storage crop, including any relevant cultivar traits that affect timing.

title: Manager Best Practices
description: What essential actions and responsibilities should a manager consistently practice to motivate, support, and retain employees?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive guidance on core managerial duties such as employee motivation, active listening, fair compensation, recognition, effective communication, equitable treatment, delegation, team building, constructive feedback, and provision of necessary resources. Relevant documents must describe these practices, explain why they matter, and offer concrete steps or examples a manager can implement.
